characters.name: Tembo
characters.description: Young grey African elephant calf with big curious eyes and oversized floppy ears

characters.name: Mama Amara
characters.description: Large gentle mother elephant with kind eyes and dusty tusks, warm nurturing presence

characters.name: Grandmother Nyota
characters.description: Elderly matriarch elephant with weathered grey skin, one broken tusk, deep wise eyes

characters.name: Kippy
characters.description: Playful young elephant calf slightly older than Tembo, always covered in dried mud, mischievous

step3.styleDescription: Pixar-quality 3D rendering. Smooth, rounded forms with subsurface scattering on skin. Dramatic cinematic lighting with warm key light and cool fill. Rich saturated colors. Photorealistic textures but stylized proportions. Depth of field with bokeh. The look of a Pixar feature film still.
